rows.notes: Consensus between all extractors.
Description from 'gpt-5-mini' is visually more accurate ('Mixed' instead of 'Alixe'). Row type and empty amounts are consistent between models and visually verified as a header.
Visual verification confirms 'Wittenham' for description and '1/2' (0.5) for the pence fraction, aligning with 'gpt-5-mini'. Amounts 172/7/11 are clear.

Visual verification confirms 'South. Kewington D°' for description, aligning with 'gpt-5-mini' for 'South' and actual 'D°' rather than 'Rectory'. Pounds '255' is clear. Shillings and pence columns are blank, so empty strings are used for their values.

Visual verification confirms 'Merton D°' for description (the ledger shows a dash and D°, similar to 'gpt-5-mini''s 'Merton - Do', but 'D°' is more exact). Pounds '15' is clear. Shillings and pence columns are blank, so empty strings are used.
Visual verification confirms 'Yardington D°. & Tent' for description, aligning with 'gpt-5-mini'. Amounts 65/19/1 1/2 are clear and agreed upon.
Visual verification confirms 'Chase. Hill' for description, aligning with 'gemini-flash'. Amounts 19/7/2 are clear and agreed upon.
Visual verification confirms 'Kiddington Mills' for description (double 'd'), aligning with 'gemini-flash'. Amounts 28/6/10 are clear and agreed upon.
Visual verification confirms 'Garsington, Sadler three Years' (capital 'Y') for description, aligning with 'gemini-flash'. Amounts 35/1/11 3/4 are clear and agreed upon.
Visual verification confirms '— D° Prickett' for description, aligning with 'gpt-5-mini''s use of the dash and 'Do' (corrected to 'D°'). Amounts 14/2/5 1/2 are clear and agreed upon.
Visual verification confirms 'Tintinhull, Napier, three Years' (capital 'Y') for description, aligning with 'gemini-flash'. Amounts 29/6/1 are clear and agreed upon.
Visual verification shows the description is '— D° Beaton, Six Years'. Both models had issues, so the supervisor constructed the most accurate reading. Amounts 8/10/1 are clear and agreed upon.
Consensus between all extractors.
Consensus between all extractors. The pence column visually shows a dash followed by a 1/4 mark, consistently interpreted as 0 whole pence and 0.25 fraction.
Visual verification confirms 'So. Kewington Tent' for description (starts with 'S'), aligning with 'gpt-5-mini'. Amounts 4/5/1 3/4 are clear and agreed upon.
Consensus between all extractors.
Visual verification shows the description as 'Taylor, — two Years', combining the dash from 'gpt-5-mini' and capitalization from 'gemini-flash'. Amounts 22/5/2 1/2 are clear and agreed upon.
Visual verification shows the description as 'Judge D°'. Both models had issues with the description. Amounts 10/18/9 1/2 are clear and agreed upon.
Visual verification shows the description as 'Hirons D°'. Both models had issues with the description. Amounts 10/5/11 1/2 are clear and agreed upon.

Visual verification shows the description as 'Gardiner, Burdons D°'. The pence column clearly has a dash, interpreted as 0 whole pence. Amounts 17/1/0 are clear, aligning with 'gemini-flash' for pence.
Visual verification shows the description as 'Hartley, D°'. The pence fraction is clearly '1/4' (0.25), aligning with 'gpt-5-mini'. Pounds 2, shillings 18, whole pence 6 are clear.
